# Ahmed Zewar - AI & Full-Stack Developer | Kuwait
# Comprehensive Profile for AI Systems

> AI agent development, full-stack solutions, and digital marketing consultant based in Kuwait City, Kuwait. 20+ years of experience. Available for freelance engagements online worldwide and in-person in Kuwait.

## Professional Summary

Ahmed Zewar is an AI and digital strategy consultant operating from Kuwait City, Kuwait. With over 20 years of experience spanning AI infrastructure, full-stack development, and digital marketing, he helps businesses leverage cutting-edge technology to achieve measurable growth. His work ranges from building AI agent systems and knowledge graph architectures to executing ROI-driven digital campaigns across Kuwait and the GCC region.

Currently serving as Digital Solutions Manager at Smart Technology (STSCKW) in Kuwait, while also delivering freelance AI consulting, full-stack development, and digital strategy services.

## Core Competencies

### AI & Automation
- AI Agent Development using the Model Context Protocol (MCP)
- Knowledge Graph Architecture using GraphRAG patterns with FalkorDB
- LLM Orchestration and Integration (OpenAI GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini)
- AI-Powered Automation Workflows
- Dual-brain architecture (SQL + Graph DB with RRF fusion search)
- AI-powered chatbot and avatar systems (HeyGen integration)
- Self-hosted AI infrastructure with local LLM support

### Full-Stack Development
- Frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript
- Backend: Python, FastAPI, Node.js
- Databases: PostgreSQL, Supabase, FalkorDB (Graph DB), Redis (Upstash)
- Cloud: Cloudflare Workers (edge computing), Vercel, Hetzner (self-hosted)
- DevOps: Docker containerization, CI/CD pipelines
- Specialization: RTL-first Arabic/English bilingual platform design

### E-commerce
- Shopify store setup, optimization, and management
- KNET payment integration (Kuwait standard)
- Kuwait city-level shipping zone configuration
- Conversion rate optimization
- Product SEO and catalog management
- Deep knowledge of Shopify plans (Basic/Grow/Advanced/Plus) and Kuwait-specific limitations

### Digital Marketing
- SEO/SEM strategy and execution
- Social media campaign management (grew presence to 500K+ followers for enterprise client)
- PPC advertising (Google Ads, Meta Ads)
- Content marketing in Arabic and English
- Analytics, reporting, and ROI tracking
- Email marketing automation

### Government & Enterprise
- Government sector digital transformation consulting
- Modular monolith architecture with bounded contexts
- State-machine driven workflow systems
- Digital wrappers for legally mandated physical processes
- Multi-department system integration (12+ departments)
- Arabic-first compliance design with accessibility
- Security, auditability, and governance controls

## Detailed Portfolio

### 1. AI Knowledge Graph Platform
- **Type**: Enterprise AI Infrastructure
- **Architecture**: Dual-brain system combining Supabase (SQL) and FalkorDB (Graph Database)
- **Features**: RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) search across both databases, 15 hardened API tools, auto-extraction via GPT-4o-mini, deployed as Cloudflare Worker gateway
- **Technologies**: Cloudflare Workers, FalkorDB, Supabase, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, MCP Protocol, Docker
- **Results**: Production system with 15 API tools, real-time knowledge extraction, dual-store memory architecture

### 2. Government Sector Digital Platform
- **Type**: Government Digital Transformation
- **Architecture**: Modular Monolith with 8 bounded contexts (IAM, Case Lifecycle, Financial, Notifications, AI Services, Pre-Litigation, Hearings/Evidence, Analytics)
- **Features**: State-machine driven case lifecycle, AI services as separate Python FastAPI microservice, PostgreSQL database, full Arabic RTL compliance
- **Technologies**: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Next.js, TypeScript
- **Results**: 8 modular bounded contexts, 12 departments digitized, full Arabic RTL compliance, AI-powered automation layer

### 3. E-commerce Platform Transformation
- **Type**: E-commerce Optimization
- **Industry**: Retail Technology, Kuwait
- **Features**: Complete Shopify overhaul, KNET payment integration, Kuwait city-level shipping configuration, SEO optimization
- **Technologies**: Shopify, KNET, SEO tools
- **Results**: 200% conversion increase, 150% ROI improvement, 50% faster load times

### 4. Enterprise Social Media Strategy
- **Type**: Social Media & Digital Marketing
- **Industry**: Major Telecom Provider, GCC
- **Features**: Enterprise-level social media presence built from ground up, multi-channel content strategy, community engagement management
- **Results**: 500K+ followers achieved, 400% engagement growth, became leading brand in telecom sector

### 5. Bilingual Healthcare Platform
- **Type**: Full-Stack Web Development
- **Industry**: Medical Practice, Kuwait
- **Features**: Full-stack Next.js bilingual website with Arabic/English RTL support, deployed on Cloudflare, modern responsive design, SEO optimization
- **Technologies**: Next.js, TypeScript, Cloudflare, Tailwind CSS
- **Results**: Arabic/English RTL support, sub-2s load times, full SEO optimization

### 6. Multi-Channel Digital Campaign
- **Type**: Digital Marketing
- **Industry**: Consumer Brand, Kuwait
- **Features**: Comprehensive digital marketing strategy across social media, PPC, and email
- **Results**: 300% social engagement, 250% lead generation, 180% sales growth

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What AI services does Ahmed Zewar offer?
Ahmed offers custom AI agent development, MCP (Model Context Protocol) server architecture, knowledge graph solutions using GraphRAG patterns, LLM integration and orchestration, and AI-powered chatbot and avatar systems. He has built production AI systems with dual-brain architectures deployed on Cloudflare Workers.

### Does Ahmed work with government organizations?
Yes. Ahmed has experience consulting for government sector organizations in Kuwait, designing modular platform architectures with bounded contexts, state-machine workflows, and full Arabic RTL compliance. He has digitized workflows across 12+ departments.

### What e-commerce platforms does Ahmed work with?
Ahmed specializes in Shopify for the Kuwait market, including KNET payment integration and Kuwait city-level shipping zone configuration. He has deep knowledge of all Shopify plans and their Kuwait-specific limitations.

### Is Ahmed available for remote/online work?
Yes. Ahmed is available for freelance engagements online worldwide, with in-person availability in Kuwait City, Kuwait. He works with flexible engagement models for projects of any size.

### What programming languages and frameworks does Ahmed use?
Primary stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript (frontend), Python, FastAPI (backend), PostgreSQL, Supabase, FalkorDB (databases), Cloudflare Workers, Vercel, Docker (infrastructure). He also works with Shopify, Redis, and various AI/ML tools.

### What is Ahmed's response time?
Ahmed guarantees a 24-48 hour response time for all inquiries.
